name: CerisPheromone
descrip: Conjure a magical haze of aphrodisiac, filling all your opponents with growing lust. Can not be in a stance.
statusOutcome: With quick chant and deft magical motions [AttackerName] sends out a hazy pink mist that seeps into [TargetName]'s lungs and body leaving [TargetHimOrHer] flush with lust!
statusMiss: With quick chant and deft magical motions [AttackerName] sends out a hazy pink mist that seeps into [TargetName]'s lungs and body, but [TargetHeOrShe] seems completely unaffected!
